session.user: Run `make lint` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results. Then run `make fast-test` and report results.

tool_use.name: Bash

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
### make lint **ruff passed: All checks passed!**
### make fast-ci **Exit code: 2 (Prettier formatting issue)**
The fast-ci target failed due to Prettier formatting issues in 2 documentation files:
**Files requiring formatting:** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**All other checks passed:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: All files formatted correctly - Markdown Check: Passed - Exec Reference Check: OK - Type Check (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5848 passed in 25.76s - Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.77s - Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.89s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
The only failure is the Prettier formatting check - 2 markdown files need formatting. These can be fixed by running `prettier --write` on those specific files.
